sessions.summary: LLM Council pre-flight on the design spec — caught a chunking-math correctness bug + drove spike-before-plan; spec patched and ready for writing-plans
achievements: Ran full LLM Council (5 advisors + 3 peer reviewers) against the design spec
Contrarian flagged ffmpeg `-c copy -segment_time 300` keyframe-snap drift as correctness bug, not polish
Executor demanded 30-min spike before any plan; First Principles challenged the fork premise outright
User ran size-ladder probe (60s/5min/12min/18min) — single-call works to 18min/21MB/286K tokens
User ran drift probe on 37-min source — measured ~4s cumulative drift by chunk 7
Patched spec: cumulative ffprobe offsets, single-call default ≤18min/20MB, glossary added, real transcript.md sample inlined
Resolved 75% threshold debate: kept threshold but augmented with inline gap-marker segments (Option B over raise-to-90%)
Pinned gap-marker reason vocabulary to 4-value enum (chunk_failed_http/json_parse/max_tokens/timeout) to prevent free-form leakage
Recommended FAA-style cushion: operate at 15min/17MB, document max-observed 18min/21MB separately
Acceptance #7 rewritten as format-shape assertions (timestamp monotonicity, valid scene tags, frame paths resolve)
next: Apply gap-marker patch + 15/17 cushion + duration_sec example fix + run-id/.base/scene-tag glossary additions
Then invoke superpowers:writing-plans to break spec into ordered implementation steps

sessions.summary: Forked docusphere/video-analyzer for SAP LiteLLM proxy + local Whisper; Phase 1 v0.1.0 shipped end-to-end with 56 passing tests in ~2.5 hours
achievements: Scanned upstream repo, mapped architecture (8 Python scripts, ~250 line surgical fork plan)
Spike probe confirmed video-via-base64 works through LiteLLM up to 18min/21MB/286K tokens
Drift probe found chunk_index*300 timestamp math is wrong by ~4s on chunk 7 of 37-min video
Wrote spec at C:\SAPDevelop\docs\superpowers\plans\ with empirical findings + drift-bug fix
Council critique applied: relaxed snapshot-equality acceptance, raised gap-marker visibility (inline + pinned enum)
Built skill at ~/.claude/skills/analyze/ with 15 conventional commits, 56 passing tests, 1 skipped (real-LiteLLM passes when env set)
Implemented chunker.py with cumulative ffprobe-derived offsets — drift-assertion test enforces correctness
Implemented understand_litellm.py with parallel ThreadPoolExecutor + 75% threshold gate
Implemented vault_writer.py with slugify + frontmatter cache lookup + videos.base scaffolding
Modified avt.py with obsidian_mode toggle for ![[]] embeds + YAML frontmatter
Created whisper_local.py with ivrit-ai auto-selection for Hebrew, Systran-medium fallback
Live e2e on real 37-min video: 8 chunks parallel through SAP LiteLLM → 128 segments, 0 failures, transcript landed in vault
Cache hit confirmed: re-running on same URL returns cached path in <1s without LiteLLM calls
blockers: Edge App-Bound Encryption (v148) breaks --cookies-from-browser; bypass is to disconnect VPN entirely (residential IP not bot-blocked)
Big Buck Bunny test hit YouTube 429 on subtitles — used local file path with --no-whisper instead
next: Use the skill on real videos for a week
Phase 2 reconsidered after week of personal use: public extraction, Hebrew video real test, smart chunk-boundary handling, sliding-window VTT cleanup

sessions.summary: Brainstormed time/task management system; council rejected first design as overbuilt; iterated to one-command MVP
achievements: Long brainstorm session mapping the actual problem (multi-session memory + forward motion across 11 lanes)
LLM Council reviewed initial 3-layer architecture and rejected as 'sediment, not architecture'
Reframed lanes into 3 categories with own thresholds (keep-alive / deep-work / hobby)
Shipped MVP: single /tm skill at C:\Users\I543234\.claude\skills\tm\SKILL.md
Created Lanes.md inventory at Obsidian Areas/ with 11 active lanes
Deleted earlier 3-command time-orchestrator skill in favor of single /tm
Wrote design spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-21-time-task-orchestrator-design.md
Set explicit kill criteria: <2 uses/day after 1 week → delete project
blockers: User going on 2-day חג immediately after — first real test deferred
next: User runs /tm after returning from חג
Evaluate against kill criteria after 1 week
If passing: add slot logic + auto-display (Phases 2-3)
If failing: delete project, no sunk cost

sessions.summary: Manual restart of hebrew-dictate — hotkey launcher wasn't running after reboot, Startup folder unreliable
achievements: Confirmed hotkey launcher (hebrew-dictate-hotkey.pyw) not running post-reboot
Manually started launcher — double-tap Right Ctrl restored
Documented Startup folder unreliability as known issue
next: Consider Windows Task Scheduler instead of Startup folder for reliability
